description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The ramp features a smooth, curved surface with vertical extensions on both ends, allowing for aerial tricks and stunts. It is constructed primarily from wood panels, with metal coping along the top edges for grinding. The structure is adorned with various graffiti artworks, including stylized tags and a figure spray-painting, giving it an authentic street culture vibe. Safety railings are present along the upper platforms on both sides to prevent falls. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for skateboarding, BMX, and similar activities.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal coping, graffiti art, and safety railings, designed for urban recreational use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main curved ramp surface, graffiti art including a crouched figure, and safety railings on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the half-pipe, visible metal coping, and graffiti on the ramp surface and side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite curved ramp face, large graffiti tag, and upper safety railings.
description_view_3: Alternate side view with visible graffiti, metal coping, and the open, continuous curve of the ramp.
